productPolish.welcomeSubtitle: The source of truth for services, contracts, changes and operational knowledge
productPolish.quickstartSubtitle: Recommended next steps based on your role
productPolish.emptyStateAction: Get started by exploring the options below
productPolish.notConfiguredDesc: This feature requires configuration before it can be used
productPolish.blockedDesc: You don't have permission to access this resource. Contact your administrator.
productPolish.quotaExceededDesc: Your usage quota for this feature has been exceeded. Please contact your administrator.
productPolish.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search criteria or filters
productPolish.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
productPolish.guidanceServices: The Service Catalog is your source of truth for all registered services, their owners, dependencies, and operational status.
productPolish.guidanceContracts: Contract Governance lets you browse, create, version, and validate API contracts with full lifecycle management.
productPolish.guidanceChanges: Change Intelligence tracks production changes, confidence scoring, blast radius, and change-to-incident correlation.
productPolish.guidanceOperations: Operations centralizes incident management, runbooks, and team-owned service reliability metrics.
productPolish.guidanceAiHub: AI Hub provides governed AI assistance, model management, policies, and IDE integrations for your team.
productPolish.guidanceGovernance: Governance delivers executive reporting, risk analysis, compliance tracking, and enterprise controls.
productPolish.guidanceAdmin: Administration covers user management, access controls, licensing, and audit trails.
productPolish.guidanceKnowledge: Source of Truth is your central reference for all services, contracts, and operational knowledge.

Engineer.step3: Check open incidents affecting your services
Engineer.step4: Browse API contracts for your services

TechLead.step2: Check change risk for your team
TechLead.step4: Review open incidents for your team

assistantPanel.title: AI Assistant

contextHint.change: Ask about {{name}} — risk, blast radius, rollback
contextHint.incident: Ask about {{name}} — root cause, mitigation, runbook

welcome.service: I can help you understand the **{{name}}** service — its contracts, dependencies, recent changes, and operational status. All answers are grounded in NexTraceOne's Source of Truth.
welcome.contract: I can help you analyze the **{{name}}** contract — its versions, compatibility, consumers, and governance status. All answers are grounded in the Contract Registry.
welcome.change: I can help you assess the **{{name}}** change — its risk profile, blast radius, correlated incidents, and rollback readiness. All answers are grounded in Change Intelligence data.
welcome.incident: I can help you investigate the **{{name}}** incident — potential root causes, correlated changes, mitigation steps, and applicable runbooks. All answers are grounded in Incident History and operational knowledge.

service.overview: What is the current status and overview of {{name}}?
service.contracts: What contracts does {{name}} expose or consume?
service.dependencies: What are the dependencies and consumers of {{name}}?
service.recentChanges: What recent changes have been deployed to {{name}}?

contract.explain: Explain the current version of {{name}} and its key endpoints
contract.compatibility: Is {{name}} compatible with all registered consumers?
contract.versionDiff: What changed between the latest versions of {{name}}?

change.riskAnalysis: What is the risk analysis for {{name}}?
change.blastRadius: What is the blast radius of {{name}}?
change.correlatedIncidents: Are there any incidents correlated with {{name}}?

incident.rootCause: What is the likely root cause of {{name}}?
incident.mitigation: What mitigation steps should I take for {{name}}?
incident.relatedChanges: What recent changes could have caused {{name}}?
incident.runbook: Is there a runbook applicable to {{name}}?

response.serviceAnalysis: Based on the Service Catalog and related sources, here is the analysis for
response.contractAnalysis: Based on the Contract Registry and version history, here is the analysis for
response.changeAnalysis: Based on Change Intelligence and correlated data, here is the analysis for
response.incidentAnalysis: Based on Incident History and operational knowledge, here is the analysis for
response.serviceGroundingNote: This analysis is grounded in the Service Catalog, Contract Registry, and Dependency Graph. For deeper investigation, use the suggested actions below.
response.contractGroundingNote: This analysis is grounded in the Contract Registry and Version History. Use the suggested actions to explore compatibility or consumer details.
response.changeGroundingNote: This analysis is grounded in Change Intelligence data and correlated incident history. Use the suggested actions to assess blast radius or rollback eligibility.
response.incidentGroundingNote: This analysis is grounded in Incident History, correlated changes, and runbook library. Use the suggested actions to explore mitigation options.

meta.contextualRouting: Query routed to internal model with contextual grounding from the relevant Source of Truth domain.

assistantPanel.fallbackCaveat: AI provider unavailable. This response is a deterministic fallback and may not reflect real data.
assistantPanel.noContextWarning: Limited context available. Response may not reflect the current state of this entity.
assistantPanel.groundedIn: Analysis grounded in real entity data from

shell.moduleUnavailableDescription: This module is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
shell.moduleUnavailableDescriptionNamed: The {{module}} module is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

preview.bannerDescription: This module is in preview and not yet part of the certified scope. Data and features may be incomplete.

releaseScope.excludedDescription: This area remains in the codebase but is intentionally outside the final production release scope. It is not part of the supported production surface.

modules.developerPortal: Developer Portal is excluded because it still depends on preview-only flows.
modules.contracts: Contracts is excluded from the final release because core authoring and workspace flows remain partial.
modules.operations: Operations is excluded from the final release because incidents, runbooks and related flows are not yet consistently production-ready.
modules.aiHub: AI Hub is excluded from the final release because the end-to-end production flow is still partial.
modules.governance: Governance is excluded from the final release because multiple areas remain partial or preview-only.
modules.integrations: Integrations is excluded from the final release because it is still preview-only.
modules.analytics: Product Analytics is excluded from the final release because it is still partial and preview-only.
modules.platformOperations: Platform Operations is excluded from the final release because it still exposes demonstration data.
